meaning: 钦博腊索山[厄瓜多尔中部](或译琛坡拉索山)
examples: Glacier Sorbet, Ecuador.Locals who live near the Chimborazo volcano trudge up to the summit regularly to cut off 50 kg blocks of glacier ice.
